load_policies.always_load: Load immediately during the Boot Protocol.
load_policies.load_on_demand: Load only when the active task requires this folder's contents.
load_policies.disabled_by_default: Never load during startup. Write-only or accessed via specific tools/commands.

rules.description: Workspace-wide security boundaries, coding standards, and verification checklists.

personas.description: Active persona configuration (specifically fullstack-builder.md to govern behavior).

projects.description: Project-specific configurations, scoped handoffs, and detailed session logs.

skills.description: Technical capability hierarchy. Core engineering skills (engineering-judgment, debugging, code-review) are always loaded; frontend, backend, infra, design, data, product, and research are loaded only on demand.

commands.description: Procedural step-by-step developer scripts and workflow playbooks.

docs.description: Long-form conceptual manuals, reference documentation, and architectural decisions.

recipes.description: Deprecated multi-step coordination patterns. Consolidated into commands.

plugins.description: Untrusted external plugins. Excluded from loading until explicitly analyzed and imported.

scratch.description: Temporary scratchpad scripts and mess files.
